svg.title: Options 2a and 2b – shared foundation with new RDIEQUINOX schema
svg.desc: SIX data continues unchanged through existing enrichers and services into the Listing table. In parallel, Equinox data flows through a brand new RDIEQUINOX schema with its own tables, PL/SQL packages, and services, read by two new enrichers SwxEquinoxEnricher and SdxEquinoxEnricher which load into the same Listing table. Options 2a and 2b diverge after this point.
svg.text: Brand new build: schema, tables, PL/SQL, services
